overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit underground pedestrian walkway. The player ascends stairs, passes through corridors with digital billboards and vending machines, and encounters various NPCs including a woman leaning on a railing and people smoking on benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit stairway entrance to underground walkway

events.description: ascends the illuminated stairs and enters the covered pedestrian walkway
NPC in black outfit approaches and leans on the railing to the right

agents.ego_description: ascending the illuminated stairs and entering the covered walkway, moving toward the main corridor

notable_agents.action: woman in black outfit walks toward camera then leans on the yellow railing, looking down

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with warm yellow neon strip lighting along both railings
long horizontal magenta light strip on the ceiling at the top of the stairs
large digital screen displaying a face with glowing eyes
wet-looking concrete pedestrian path extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of an illuminated staircase with magenta overhead lighting. The camera ascends the stairs with yellow neon railings and enters a covered underground walkway. A female NPC in dark clothing approaches and leans on the railing as the camera passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with overhead beams and digital signage

events.description: slight turn to the left while continuing forward through the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main corridor, passing other pedestrians in the distance

entered.detail: exposed industrial ceiling beams with green painted structural elements
concrete bench with two NPCs sitting and smoking

segments.scene_description: Walking through the main corridor of the underground walkway with industrial overhead beams and neon floor lighting. The camera approaches a bench with seated NPCs visible ahead on the left. The environment features scattered pedestrians and digital billboards on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway section with seating, vending machines, and arcade games

events.description: passing by two NPCs sitting on a bench smoking, with visible smoke effects
turning right at the corner near the vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking past seated NPCs and vending machines, then turning the corner

notable_agents.action: two individuals in green jackets sitting on a bench, one smoking

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machine with illuminated display
triple arcade cabinet with glowing screens and yellow warning stripes
large digital billboard displaying WATSON WHORES advertisement

segments.scene_description: The camera passes closely by two NPCs sitting on a bench smoking, with visible smoke effects. The scene features a red vending machine and arcade game cabinets on the right. After passing the Watson Whores billboard, the camera turns the corner at the end of this section.

scene_state.functional_zone: final corridor leading to exit stairs

events.description: approaching the illuminated exit stairs at the end of the corridor
beginning to ascend the final staircase to exit the underground area

agents.ego_description: walking through the final corridor section and ascending the exit stairs

entered.detail: final illuminated staircase with yellow neon railings leading upward
doorway at the top of the stairs leading to the surface level

segments.scene_description: Walking through the final stretch of the underground walkway with digital billboards on both sides. The camera approaches and begins ascending the exit stairs, which are illuminated with yellow neon lighting similar to the entrance. The segment ends as the camera climbs toward the upper level doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit staircase into the depths of a neon-infused underground pedestrian corridor. It begins at the base of a staircase bathed in magenta overhead light, ascending past yellow neon railings to enter a covered walkway. As the camera moves forward, it passes a woman in dark clothing leaning against the railing before the space opens into a wider main corridor. The scene then shifts toward an industrial environment characterized by overhead beams and neon floor lighting, gliding past digital billboards and scattered pedestrians. Finally, the camera approaches a seating area where several NPCs are gathered on benches along the left side of the path.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit underground corridor that eventually ascends toward an exit. It begins by passing closely by two NPCs smoking on a bench, moving past a red vending machine and arcade cabinets as smoke drifts through the air. As the camera passes a Watson Whores billboard, it turns a corner to enter the final stretch of the walkway, flanked on both sides by glowing digital billboards. The scene then shifts from the flat corridor to an upward trajectory as the camera approaches and begins climbing a set of stairs illuminated by yellow neon lighting. The movement concludes as the camera ascends toward the doorway of the upper level.
